metadata.notes: Rule-6b kills caught by the pre-audit: fr 'don' n=71 (subset of Donald/donate/London), de 'Spende' n=7 (subset of Spanish 'suspende'), fr 'pret' n=1 ('pret au dialogue' = ready, not loan), en 'cargo' n=9 (Portuguese 'cargo' = office). All dropped. Dropped bare 'supply'/'supplies' as ambiguous across the sanctions and energy atomics -- the lifeline ACT is carried by tanker/shipment/deliver/convoy/aid. Dropped for 0 hits: Rosneft, Zarubezhneft, PDVSA, Sinopec, CNPC, donation, credit line, loan, debt relief, deferral, barter, ALBA, BRICS, airlift, Mariel, suministro, donacion, prestamo, credito, flete, Frachter, Kredit, Rohoel. Patron COUNTRY names deliberately absent (Australia lesson): they would admit every Cuba/Russia co-mention including pure rhetoric. Patron centroids are likewise NOT in centroid_ids -- add only if the post-attribution audit shows a real centroid gap.
